title: foxglove.Event
description: A discrete event that occurred at a specific time. An event may have zero duration (instantaneous) or a non-zero duration.

duration.title: duration
duration.description: Duration of the event. Omit or set to zero for an instant (point) event.

event_type.title: foxglove.EventType
event_type.description: Event type definition for this event. Provides category name, display color, and optional platform ID for reconciliation.

name.description: Human-readable event type name (e.g. "Traffic event", "FAULT"). Used for filtering, grouping, and display.

color.description: Hex color string (e.g. "#FF5733"). Used by the player to color timeline markers. If absent, player assigns default.

id.description: Platform event type UUID for reconciliation during ingestion. If present, platform matches by ID; if absent, falls back to name.

items.title: foxglove.EventProperty
items.description: A typed property value on an event, matching the platform's structured properties model

value.description: String-encoded value. Interpretation depends on type.

event_properties.description: Typed property values matching the platform's structured properties model.

items.title: foxglove.KeyValuePair
items.description: A key with its associated value

id.description: Stable identity for deduplication during data platform ingestion. If absent, the platform may compute a fingerprint.

device_id.description: Device ID this event is associated with. Use the platform device ID when known, or a local identifier (e.g. hostname, serial number). Required so consumers always know the source device.
